2026-04.text:
•Western GOA assets (Perdido) most exposed due to 36+ hour transit times, potentially limiting one OSV run per week.

•Any timeplanner changes, additional voyage needs, or increases in OSV intensity beyond what is shown in the current forecast, carry high risk of not being supported.

•Schedule and run cadence must remain static to avoid capacity gaps; deviations will likely require Well & Logistics Leadership prioritization.

•Cedar Ridge off hire starting April 1

2026-01.text:
•Stena - Well control issues adding additional unplanned OSV demand and SP203 sidetrack, added ~ 9 days of drilling and additional unplanned OSV demand.

•Harvey Freedom (Spot Hire OSV) Planned to begin cleaning for release on 28 January

2026-02.text:
•Western GOA assets (Whale, Perdido) most exposed due to 36+ hour transit times, potentially limiting one OSV run per week.

•Any timeplanner changes, additional voyage needs, or increases in OSV intensity beyond what is shown in the current forecast carry high risk of not being supported.

•Timeplanner schedule and run cadence must remain static to avoid capacity gaps; deviations will likely require Well & Logistics Leadership prioritization.

•Pontus forecast assumes adding 3x additional Pilot Holes and Llano PA

•Western GOA assets (Perdido) most exposed due to 36+ hour transit times, potentially limiting one OSV run per week.

•Any timeplanner changes, additional voyage needs, or increases in OSV intensity beyond what is shown in the current forecast, carry high risk of not being supported.

•Schedule and run cadence must remain static to avoid capacity gaps; deviations will likely require Well & Logistics Leadership prioritization.

•Pontus unknown schedule direction with Dover 002 Deepen, only accounting for 1 OSV run.

•Mud Demand adding extra tension in the system, as well as supplier return constraints

•Cedar Ridge moves into cleaning last week of March
